task_completion.description: Read the blueprint_setup.txt file to find calibration data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/blueprint_setup.txt.

task_completion.description: Open OpenVSP and navigate to the Background image dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application is open and the 'Background' dialog window (accessed via Window -> Background) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Load p51_top_view.jpg into the Top viewport background.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Background dialog shows 'p51_top_view.jpg' loaded specifically for the 'Top' view (usually indicated by a tab or dropdown), and the blueprint image is visible in the Top viewport of the OpenVSP workspace.

task_completion.description: Enter the calculated Scale value into the dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Scale input field in the OpenVSP Background dialog contains the value 0.004 (or a value between 0.0039 and 0.0041).

task_completion.description: Save the OpenVSP model to p51_workspace.vsp3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'p51_workspace.vsp3' in /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/, or the OpenVSP main window title bar updated to show 'p51_workspace.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP graphical user interface to configure the background.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual OpenVSP GUI and Background dialog being manipulated, rather than the agent directly editing a .vsp3 XML/text file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent entered the scale value directly into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The scale value 0.004 is visible inside the OpenVSP Background dialog's input field, not just printed in a terminal or calculator.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the OpenVSP interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP interface shows evidence of saving (e.g., File menu open, Save dialog, or updated title bar), rather than a terminal command like 'touch p51_workspace.vsp3'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected background image filename is 'p51_top_view.jpg'. The correct calculated scale value to be entered in the OpenVSP Background dialog is 0.004 (acceptable tolerance is 0.0039 to 0.0041). The final model must be saved as 'p51_workspace.vsp3'.
